positive: A majestic celestial fox guardian spirit (kitsune) composed of flowing bioluminescent crystal flora and nebula dust. The fox is centered, rendered in a stylized neo-art deco silhouette against a deep indigo cosmic background. Its tail streams with vibrant emerald and sapphire energy. The composition must feature high contrast, sharp lines, and clean, graphic elements suitable for screen printing on fabric. Use dramatic, ethereal lighting originating from the fox's internal glow, emphasizing clean negative space and symmetrical balance. Art Deco, Polynesian tattoo style mixed with celestial illustration, vector quality, highly detailed ink painting, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, noisy, out of focus, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, text, watermarks, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disconnected parts, ugly, monochrome, signature, logo
